backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes search functionality by making HTTP outcalls to the DuckDuckGo API, with a transform function for response canonicalization and error handling for blocked outcalls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the InAppBrowser iframe-blocking fallback feature to its implementation file, related components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for documentation or build planning purposes.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the SearchInterface inside a full-height flex container.
frontend/src/components/InAppBrowser.tsx: Fullscreen modal iframe browser component that detects X-Frame-Options/CSP blocking via a load-timing heuristic and onError, showing a fallback UI with an 'Open in new tab' button when embedding is blocked.
Main search UI component that renders a search form, handles loading/error states, flattens and displays DuckDuckGo RelatedTopics results as cards, and integrates the InAppBrowser for opening result links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: Custom React hook that calls the ICP backend actor's `search` method with a URL-encoded query, manages loading/error state, validates the JSON response, and extracts human-readable error messages from canister trap/reject patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm coral/teal design system in both light and dark modes, plus a fadeIn animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped in TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility that detects HTTP/HTTPS URLs in plain text and converts them to either clickable `<a>` tags or callback-driven `<button>` elements, plus a helper `isUrl` validator.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a fix request to replace a Google search backend with DuckDuckGo in the Motoko actor, along with an existing iframe fallback UI feature and a known OAuth access-denied deployment issue.
